title: Allow the creation of automations in Mirror columns
excerpt: Automations cannot be created out of a mirror column. It would be very useful to be able to do so, especially for notification settings depending on the mirrored items.

posts.author: csanchezconde (Cristina Sánchez)
posts.cookedHtml: Automations cannot be created out of a mirror column. It would be very useful to be able to do so, especially for notification settings depending on the mirrored items.
